message:
🌱 Add argo-events: Overwrite revisionHistoryLimit for Sensor Deployment mission (#899)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-1786-overwrite-revisionhistorylimit-for-sensor-deployment",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: Overwrite revisionHistoryLimit for Sensor Deployment",
+    "description": "Overwrite revisionHistoryLimit for Sensor Deployment. Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-events deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-events version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-events installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nWhen working on the sensors the ArgoCD UI gets pretty messy showing all these old sensor replica sets. It would be nice to be able to set the _revisionHistoryLimit_ of the sensor deployment."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Overwrite revisionHistoryLimit for Sensor Deployment",
+        "description": "can eventsource be overwritten?\n```yaml\napiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1\nkind: Sensor\nmetadata:\n  name: sensor-name\nspec:\n  revisionHistoryLimit: 0\n  template:\n    serviceAccountName: argo-events-sa\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Overwrite revisionHistoryLimit for Sensor Deployment\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/pull/2244",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1\nkind: Sensor\nmetadata:\n  name: sensor-name\nspec:\n  revisionHistoryLimit: 0\n  template:\n    serviceAccountName: argo-events-sa"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-events",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-events"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/issues/1786",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/pull/2244"
+    },
+    "reactions": 13,
+    "comments": 1,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-events installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:19:58.246Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
